title: False ACK from substring 'ack ' inside 'back '
failure_mode: substring trap: 'ack ' matches inside 'back '; ACK branch runs before SPEAK in fixed verdict order (FR-001)
invariant: verdict keywords must not match across word boundaries
rationale: Standard agent-assignment text ending in 'comment back with results' must be SPEAK; the deterministic substring path returns ACK instead.
